place.summary: Victoria Harbour functions primarily as a connector in Hong Kong's visitor network. Its strongest observed source market is PH. It receives notable inbound connections from Hong Kong Disneyland. Visitors often continue to Hong Kong Disneyland. It performs above its category average on observed experience.

opportunity_cards.title: Frequent companion: Hong Kong Disneyland
opportunity_cards.detail: Victoria Harbour frequently appears alongside Hong Kong Disneyland, suggesting cross-promotion or route packaging potential.

opportunity_cards.title: Strong onward link to Hong Kong Disneyland
opportunity_cards.detail: Visitors often continue from Victoria Harbour to Hong Kong Disneyland, with relatively strong journey experience.
